news.summary: In a recent report on global economic trends, it was revealed that the world GDP is projected to grow by 6% in 2021, following a decline of 3.3% in 2020. The growth is primarily driven by strong recoveries in major economies such as the US, China, and India. Moreover, the global trade is expected to increase by 8% this year, after experiencing a 9.5% decrease in 2020. However, disparities in vaccination rates between wealthy and developing countries pose a threat to the economic recovery. It is estimated that around 85% of the global population will suffer from lost income due to the pandemic, with over 150 million people falling into extreme poverty. Policymakers are urged to address these inequalities to ensure sustainable and equitable growth in the post-pandemic era.
news.headline: Castellum, Inc. sees organic revenue rise year-over-year in Q1 2025, marking a positive trend in performance.

news.headline: Brookdale Senior Living to present at 2025 RBC Global Healthcare Conference on May 20, 2025.

news.summary: In the last quarter, we achieved exceptional growth in both Mobile and Fixed customer segments, with a total increase of 218,000 customers, marking a 9,000 customer rise compared to the previous year. This performance represents our best first-quarter results to date. The growth can be attributed to the increasing popularity of our bundled services, which leverage the strength of our cutting-edge broadband networks like TTech. Additionally, the introduction of new services like TELUS Health has also contributed to this impressive growth.
news.headline: TELUS has a strong first quarter in 2025 with 218,000 customer growth, up 9,000 from last year, driven by demand for bundled services and advanced broadband networks.

news.summary: Ontario-based Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. ("AQN") has recently confirmed its dividends for both common and preferred shares, with a payout of US$0.0650 per common share. This dividend will be payable on July 15, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of June 30, 2025. The dividend covers the period from April 1, 2025, to June 30, 2025. Shareholders listed in the registry have the option to receive the dividend in Canadian dollars, specifically C$0.
news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. declares US$0.0650 (C$0.0897) common share dividend for Q2 2025, payable on July 15 to shareholders of record on June 30.

news.summary: Dublin—A new report, the "Materials Impact Report: All Industries Edition, Q1 2025," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive analysis delves into the challenges confronting materials companies in light of sustainability goals. Specifically, the report highlights the demands for clean energy investments under SDG7 and the importance of safeguarding heritage sites in extraction zones under SDG11.4. To navigate these issues, companies must adopt advanced governance methods and engage with stakeholders effectively. The report sheds light on the intricate trade-offs that companies are facing in addressing these requirements.
news.headline: Research report "Materials Impact Report: All Industries Edition, Q1 2025" highlights challenges in clean energy investments and heritage protection in materials extraction.

news.summary: Cineplex Inc. released its financial results for Q1 2025, reporting 8.4 million moviegoers and $264.3 million in revenue. They achieved a record Q1 concession per patron of $9.13 and saw 14.7% of box office revenue from international programming. The company experienced a 38% increase in media revenues and a Q1 cinema media per patron of $2.04. Despite a softer March performance, they noted optimism following CinemaCon and the success of "A Minecraft Movie." Quarterly financials showed a 10.3% decrease in total revenues, with a net loss from continuing operations of $36.6 million. Theatre attendance dropped by 14.5%, while box office revenues per patron decreased by 4.7%. Adjusted EBITDA saw a 32.1% decline. Cineplex remains encouraged by the diverse film slate ahead and strong box office growth in April, positioning them to return value to shareholders.
news.headline: Cineplex Q1 2025: 8.4M moviegoers, $264.3M revenue, 14.7% international programming, $9.13 CPP, 38% media revenue increase.

news.summary: In the wireless sector, there has been a notable increase in net subscribers by 150,000. The churn rate has also seen a positive development with a year-over-year improvement of 7.2%. Additionally, the company has successfully submitted FCC certification for over 24,000 5G operational sites, achieving this milestone a month earlier than planned. Moving to Pay TV, DISH TV experienced its lowest churn rate in more than ten years, standing at 1.36%, excluding certain instances.
news.headline: EchoStar reports positive financial results: +150K wireless subscribers, 7.2% churn reduction, 24,000 5G sites, 1.36% Pay TV churn.

news.summary: A new facility of the Oryx Stainless Group, a prominent supplier of recycled stainless steel materials based in the Netherlands, was inaugurated in Johor, Malaysia on May 9, 2025. The company is recognized globally for its high-quality products and sustainable practices. The latest facility aims to enhance production capacity and meet increasing demand, contributing towards job creation and economic growth in the region. This expansion signifies a significant milestone for Oryx, further solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Oryx Stainless opens new facility in Johor, Malaysia to bolster global green steel goals. Headquarters in Netherlands.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, GAAP earnings stood at $0.10 per diluted share, while ongoing earnings amounted to $0.19 per diluted share. The ongoing earnings guidance for 2025 is projected to be between $2.74 and $2.84 per diluted share. Additionally, the long-term earnings per share growth target falls within the range of 7% to 9%. TXNM Energy reported figures in the millions for the earnings but the exact amounts weren't disclosed.
news.headline: TXNM Energy reports Q1 2025 GAAP earnings of $0.10/share, ongoing earnings of $0.19/share, with a guidance range of $2.74 - $2.84/share. Long-term EPS growth target set at 7%-9%.

news.summary: A wallet associated with World Liberty Financial, reportedly endorsed by President Donald Trump, has acquired millions worth of Ethereum (ETH). According to on-chain tracker Lookonchain, the wallet purchased 1,587 Aave Ethereum WETH tokens, equal to $3.5 million, in multiple transactions. Aave Ethereum WETH is a token equivalent to ETH on the Ethereum network, utilized by Aave for DeFi lending and borrowing. The wallet, potentially connected to Trump's World Liberty, also bought 9.7 Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) valued at $1 million. The transactions were reported around 30 minutes prior to the announcement.
news.headline: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial purchased $3.5 million of Ethereum in a series of transactions, representing a significant investment.

news.summary: China's Vice Foreign Minister, Hua Chunying, expressed confidence in managing U.S. trade issues ahead of the first major face-to-face negotiations in Switzerland. She stated, "We have no fear," emphasizing China's readiness to face challenges posed by the Trump administration's trade policy. The weekend talks from May 9-12 will involve U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, and China's Vice-Premier He Lifeng. President Trump hinted at potential concessions, possibly addressing the 145% tariffs on Beijing. This development underscores the significance of the upcoming discussions between the two nations amidst the ongoing trade war.
news.headline: China confident ahead of US trade talks in Switzerland, "We have no fear" says Chinese Vice Foreign Minister. Discussions from May 9-12 include US Treasury Secretary and Trade Representative meeting with China's Vice-Premier. Trump hints at potential tariff reductions.

news.headline: Ethereum jumps over 20% to reach $2,400 after Pectra upgrade and trade tension relief.

news.summary: The article discusses the volatility of cryptocurrencies and how traders can manage this volatility effectively. Many beginners treat crypto trading like a slot machine, leading to poor portfolio performance. The article suggests three strategies for managing risk in the crypto market: using stop losses effectively, diversifying investments, and implementing dollar-cost averaging. Using stop losses is emphasized as an important tool to prevent significant losses. For example, setting a stop loss at $27,000 when buying Bitcoin at $30,000 can help protect against a 10% loss. The article emphasizes the importance of having a strategy and not relying on wishful thinking when trading cryptocurrencies. It also highlights the need for beginners to adopt simple yet effective risk management strategies in volatile markets.
news.headline: Beginners can manage crypto volatility with 3 strategies: Use stop losses, diversify, set profit targets. Protect investments.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Akero Therapeutics, Inc. revealed findings from the Phase 2b SYMMETRY trial at the EASL Congress 2025 in Amsterdam, demonstrating the efficacy of efruxifermin (EFX) in enhancing fibrosis in compensated cirrhosis (F4) attributed to metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH). Akero Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: AKRO), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, specializes in developing groundbreaking treatments for patients with severe metabolic disorders facing substantial unmet medical needs. The presentation highlighted the potential of EFX in addressing this critical medical issue.
news.headline: Akero Therapeutics presents Week 96 results from Phase 2b SYMMETRY trial of Efruxifermin, showing fibrosis improvement in patients with compensated cirrhosis due to MASH without worsening MASH at EASL Congress 2025 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

news.summary: AngloGold Ashanti plc disclosed notable financial gains in Q1 2025 compared to Q1 2024, showcasing a significant growth trend. The Company witnessed a substantial increase in free cash flow*, soaring by seven times to $403 million, a remarkable surge of 607% from $57 million previously. Additionally, profit attributable to equity shareholders also spiked almost eightfold during the same period. This exceptional performance was bolstered by heightened gold production(3), efficient cost controls, and a favorable gold price environment.
news.headline: AngloGold Ashanti reports strong Q1 2025 performance: Gold production up 22%, Free cash flow rises 607% to $403m, Earnings increase 671%.

news.summary: Sanuwave Health, Inc. reported their Q1 2025 financial results with revenues of $9.3 million, up by 61% from Q1 2024, marking their highest Q1 revenues ever. The Q1 2025 gross margin was 79%, and GAAP Operating Income was $1.0 million, a $2.0 million increase from Q1 2024. 98 UltraMist™ systems were sold in Q1 2025, up from 43 in Q1 2024. The UltraMist™ consumables revenue increased by 43% to $5.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA for Q1 2025 was $2.3 million. The company projected a revenue growth of 40-50% for Q2 2025 compared to Q2 2024. They also reiterated a full-year 2025 revenue guidance of $48-50 million, expecting a 47-53% increase over 2024. The company's net loss for Q1 2025 was $5.7 million due to fair value changes in derivative liabilities, an improvement from $4.5 million in Q1 2024. Sanuwave aims for 2025 as a breakout year and will hold a conference call on May 9, 2025, to provide business updates. Total operating expenses for Q1 2025 were $6.4 million, and the net loss for the quarter was $5.7 million. The company predicts a revenue range of $10.0 to $10.7 million for Q2 2025 and a full-year revenue range of $48-50 million for 2025. Sanuwave has a strong focus on regenerative medicine products and aims to enhance profitability while maintaining growth momentum.
news.headline: Sanuwave's Q1 FY2025 revenues reached $9.3 million, up 61% from Q1 2024, with Q1 2025 gross margin at 79.0%. CEO is optimistic about the rest of 2025. Guidance for Q2 2025 expects a 40-50% growth compared to Q2 2024. Adjusted EBITDA for Q1 2025 was $2.3 million, a significant increase from the previous year's negative $59 thousand. Company's focus on profitability and revenue growth reflects in financial results. Company website contains conference call and financial data for further insights.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged to its highest levels since January, hitting $104,000 before retracing to establish support. Traders are focusing on key levels, with $100,000 representing a crucial point. The current price action, measured from $75,000 lows, is a significant battleground. BTC price has risen 10% in days, just $6,000 away from new all-time highs. Prices are headline-driven, influenced by news like US-UK trade deals. Analysts emphasize the need for passive flows and strong volume to support price levels. Fibonacci levels indicate BTC is approaching a key zone before new ATHs. However, liquidity issues await, with bids clustered below $100,000 and less resistance to the upside, hinting at potential volatility. Trading cautiously is advised, as every move carries risk and requires individual research.
news.headline: Bitcoin price nears $100K after 10% increase in days. Bulls face crucial $104K resistance, with support at $100K level. Market wary of potential liquidations below $103K as BTC eyes new highs. Be cautious in this volatile market.
